expectations.text: Response covers technical SEO checks (robots.txt, sitemap, HTTPS)
expectations.evidence: Step 1 'Technical SEO' (30% weight) includes detailed table with checks for robots.txt, sitemap.xml, HTTPS enforcement, mobile viewport, canonical URL, and page language. Also flags noindex as a red flag to check immediately.

expectations.text: Response analyzes on-page SEO (title, meta description, headings)
expectations.evidence: Step 2 'On-Page SEO' (30% weight) covers title tag (30-60 chars), meta description (120-160 chars), H1 count (exactly 1), heading hierarchy, image alt text, internal links, and content length (300+ words).

Step 3 'Structured Data' (15% weight) checks for JSON-LD presence, schema type validity, required properties per type, and JSON validity. Mentions Product, Offer, SoftwareApplication, and WebPage types.

expectations.text: Response evaluates Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS)
expectations.evidence: Step 5 'Core Web Vitals' (15% weight) covers LCP (<2.5s), INP (<200ms), and CLS (<0.1) with specific concerns about hero video impact. Includes video-specific checks for poster attribute, dimensions, lazy loading, and CDN.

Section 'Most Likely Causes of the Traffic Drop' provides 6 issues ranked P0-P2 by probability. Output section mentions prioritized recommendations grouped by P0 (Critical) through P3 (Low). Uses a severity matrix throughout.
